description: {"edges": "Slightly serrated, some curling observed.", "veins": "Visible, but discoloration along veins is present."} {"color": "Yellow to chlorotic, with some areas appearing pale green.", "shape": "Irregular, blotchy, and interveinal."} Symptoms are concentrated along the midrib and extending outwards between the veins, with a gradient from healthy green to chlorotic yellow. Primarily affects the lower portion of the leaf.
